# Templates

Templates is an Acode plugin that helps developers quickly create project templates.

## Features

- Create HTML5 projects
- Create PHP projects
- Create JavaScript projects

## Generated files

### HTML5 Template
- index.html
- style.css
- script.js

### PHP Template
- index.php

### JavaScript Template
- index.js

## Installation

Install the plugin from the generated `plugin.zip` file in Acode.
